report.summary: Standup v18 Apr 3: 3 agents ran since v17 — publish-v2 promoted 4 pages (OTC, blob economics, impermanent loss, Hyperliquid), community-v13 drafted tweets #470-474 + Newsletter v47 + 2 social cards, eod-v10 confirmed 104 learn pages (+2 Glamsterdam/Restaking Wars). 69 total runs today = ~$6,238 human-equiv. Deploy debt at 28th escalation. BTC $66,650 (+0.6%), F&G 9, DRIFT -40% exploit.

sections.title: Analytics
items: DELTA SINCE LAST STANDUP (v17 → v18): 3 agents ran — publish (1), community (1), eod (1). Publish-v2 promoted 4 pages to published status (crypto-otc-trading, ethereum-blob-economics, impermanent-loss, hyperliquid) — all passed structural QA, 9 total pages promoted today. Community-v13 drafted tweets #470-474 covering BTC first green month, X scam kill switch, Coinbase OCC charter, Australia crypto law, April setup roundup. Newsletter v47 themed 'Bitcoin's First Green Month — Now What?' + 2 social cards (BTC Green Month Breakout, OCC Federal Custody). EOD-v10 confirmed 104 learn pages on disk (+2 from Glamsterdam 799 lines + Restaking Wars 899 lines), all 6 API routes structurally healthy.

MARKET UPDATE — BTC $66,650 (+0.6% from yesterday): BTC at $66,650-$66,873 range, modest gains outperforming wider market. ETH $2,057 (-3.8% 24h). Market cap $2.38T (-2.4% 24h). Trading volume $105.4B. BTC dominance 56.2%. Good Friday — traditional markets closed, thin liquidity.

F&G INDEX: 9 — Extreme Fear. Apr 1: 8, Apr 2: 8, Apr 3: 9. Sub-10 readings sustained 4+ consecutive days — most extreme since Terra-Luna June 2022 (bottomed at 6). Historically, sub-10 readings preceded major accumulation phases within 30-90 days.

KEY NEWS: DRIFT Protocol exploited — DRIFT token fell 40% in 24h. Sonic Labs burning 32.69M unclaimed S tokens after Oct 15. Telegram Wallet launched perpetual futures (50x leverage). Coinbase OCC conditional approval advancing. MARA 15% layoffs + $1.3B Q4 loss. Stablecoin supply $316B ATH.

CONTENT ON DISK: 104 learn page dirs (+2 from v17). 9 pages promoted to published today across 2 publish cycles. 474 tweets drafted all-time, 47 newsletter editions, 99+ social cards. Pipeline at highest-ever depth.

EGRESS NOTE: Sandbox blocks CoinGecko, alternative.me, Vercel, Google Search Console. Market data from Fortune, Yahoo Finance, CoinGabbar, CoinDCX, CoinDesk. No direct analytics verification possible.

sections.title: Project Manager
items: LAST CYCLE ACTIVITY (v17 → v18): 3 agent runs — publish-v2 (promoted 4 pages: OTC trading, blob economics, impermanent loss, Hyperliquid — all passed QA, 2/4 missing metaDescription field but non-blocking), community-v13 (tweets #470-474, Newsletter v47, 2 social card SVGs, growth trajectory analysis), eod-v10 (2 new learn guides confirmed: Glamsterdam 799 lines + Restaking Wars 899 lines, 104 total pages, 6/6 API routes healthy).
TODAY'S FULL AGENT ACTIVITY: 69 agent runs across 6 types — standup×18 ($810), build×15 ($3,495), community×13 ($533), design×11 ($660), eod×10 ($630), publish×2 ($110). Total human-equiv: $6,238.

P0 — COMMIT + DEPLOY (28TH CONSECUTIVE ESCALATION): Deploy debt remains CRITICAL. 104 learn pages in workspace, 9 pages promoted to published today. Production frozen at e3f63fc (Apr 2). Design has polished all pages. Community has 474 tweets + 47 newsletters ready. Content aging: Bear Market Recovery guide (F&G at 9 = users searching NOW), DRIFT exploit coverage window open, Glamsterdam/Restaking Wars timely. JEFE ACTION REQUIRED.

P1 — PUBLISH QUEUE PROGRESS: 9 pages promoted today across 2 batches. ~14 queued pages remain from today's data files (v4-v11). 2 previously deferred pages (impermanent-loss, hyperliquid) resolved and promoted.

P2 — BUILD QUALITY: EOD-v10 confirmed both new guides (Glamsterdam, Restaking Wars) clean — server-rendered, full metadata, JSON-LD schemas. 2 carry-over warnings remain (mev-guide, solana-vs-ethereum since v6).
P3 — API RESILIENCE UNCHANGED: 0/6 public routes with rate limiting. 1/6 with fallback data. 3/6 missing X-Cache-Source header. Carry-over 28+ cycles.

sections.title: CEO — Next Cycle Priorities
items: PRIORITY 1 — COMMIT + DEPLOY (P0 — 28TH ESCALATION): 69 agent runs today = $6,238 human-equiv invested with zero user-facing output. Content quality at peak — all pages server-rendered, metadata clean, OG images ready. Time-sensitive windows: DRIFT exploit coverage (token -40%, users searching NOW), Bear Market Recovery (F&G at 9 for 4+ consecutive days), Glamsterdam (ePBS/10K TPS narrative), Restaking Wars (EigenLayer $15.2B TVL). Each hour without deploy = content freshness decay. One deploy unlocks entire pipeline. Deploy urgency: MAXIMUM.

PRIORITY 2 — DRIFT EXPLOIT CONTENT WINDOW: DRIFT fell 40% in 24h from protocol attack. Users are searching for explanations and safety guidance NOW. Next build cycle should produce a Drift Protocol explainer covering the exploit, DeFi security checklist, and how users can protect LP positions. This is a high-intent, low-competition window that closes in 24-48h.

PRIORITY 3 — EXTREME FEAR ACCUMULATION SIGNALS: F&G at 9 for 4+ days — historically once-every-2-years signal. Sub-10 median 90d return is +62%. Stablecoin $316B ATH = record institutional dry powder. BTC snapped 5-month losing streak in March (+1.8%). Coinbase + Crypto.com OCC charters = federal custody infrastructure arriving. Content should lean hard into accumulation strategy guides, DCA optimization, and bottom-indicator education while window is open.
